name: LIVELY || Beckett O’Brien
description:
The Artist’s Touch.

Painting is a great way to express—whether that is something simple or something more complex. The outcome always satisfactory when it all comes together. Now you are the canvas while he becomes the painter holding the brush.

It’s good to see you in my requests again!!

Anyways—the pins you provided actually helped a LOT during the process for visualizing. Beckett loves creative processes that require focus like expressive journaling or scrapbooking!

Fun fact: I had originally titled it Mastering More Than Canvas but it was a little too long for my current style.
